name: Radiance
description:
While holding this wand, you gain a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. In addition, you ignore {@quickref Cover||3||half cover} when making a spell attack. Radiance is in the form of an exquisite golden hand mirror.
While surrounded by darkness, it sheds dim light in a 5-foot radius. A creature that is attuned to Radiance can use a bonus action while holding the mirror to cast the {@spell enhance ability} spell, choosing itself and no other creature as the spell's target. Once this property of the
